query:
INSERT INTO activity
               (occurred_at, verb, actor_user_id, target_student_id, syllabus_id)
           SELECT
               sa.graduated_at,
               'syllabus_graduated',
               COALESCE(sa.graduated_by_id, sa.student_id),
               sa.student_id,
               sa.syllabus_id
           FROM syllabus_assignments sa
           WHERE sa.graduated_at IS NOT NULL
